description: The Color By Speed Min Max component makes particles in a particle system change their color based on their speed using a minimum and maximum speed value. Lerps between min and max colors.

fields.MinSpeed: The speed the particle has to be be traveling at or under to become ``MinColor``.
fields.MaxSpeed: The speed the particle has to be be traveling at or above to become ``MaxColor``.
fields.MinColor: The color to display when traveling at or below ``MinSpeed``.
fields.MaxColor: The color to display when traveling at or above ``MaxSpeed``.
